default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, branding, and website development.](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has set up a comprehensive Notion workspace for project management and content planning](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Knapsack is considering rebranding from "knap.ai" to "knapsack.ai" and potentially renaming "automations" to a more user-friendly term](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [A temporary Webflow site will be developed to start publishing content while a more permanent solution is in progress](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Content strategy will focus on building topical authority around Knapsack's key offerings and target industries](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Management

  - [GrowthX has created a Notion workspace for project management, including:](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Team and stakeholder information](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Meeting logs](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Task tracking](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [Competitive research](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [Performance reports](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [An Airtable has been prepared with:](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Calibration articles for tone and voice](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Personas and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Competitor analysis](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
      - [Content templates and clusters](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Competitor Landscape

  - [Two main types of competitors identified:](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [RPA (Remote Process Automation) providers (e.g., Automation Anywhere)](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [Microsoft Power Automate (hybrid RPA and other automation)](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [AI agents are emerging as a related but distinct category](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### Branding Considerations

  - [Debating between keeping "knap.ai" or switching to "knapsack.ai"](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
      - [Pros of "knap.ai": shorter, perceived as more legitimate](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Pros of "knapsack.ai": easier to spell and remember, aligns with product name](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Considering alternatives to the term "automations":](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [Potential options: guides, power boosts](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
      - [Need to balance SEO considerations with user-friendly terminology](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

### Website Development

  - [Current Webflow site is basic but functional](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Exploring options with web development agencies (Web Stacks, Lightbox)](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [GrowthX may bring in freelancers to help create an MVP site in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Recommendation to use a "learn" section instead of a traditional blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Example: deepgram.com/learn](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Allows for future expansion beyond just blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)

### Content Publishing Timeline

  - [Can start with calibration articles as early as the end of this week](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Aiming for 10 articles per week, ramping up to 20 articles in subsequent weeks](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Earlier publishing allows for faster data collection and strategy refinement](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to regroup and provide an update on Webflow development assistance within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Mark to review calibration articles in the Notion workspace](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Decide on URL structure and site organization (e.g., /learn vs. /blog)](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Begin content production and publishing as soon as possible, even with a temporary site](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Continue discussions on branding and terminology choices](https://fathom.video/share/e6xLSKvQE1oKyBWYX5z1jwixSbpZ9sYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

action_items.description: Connect freelancers to help build out initial MVP website
